facts.description: The current approved product name must appear.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'FlowForge Sprint' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved headline must appear prominently.
facts.expected_value: Plan the week in one calm board.
facts.canonical_answer: Plan the week in one calm board.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Plan the week in one calm board.' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved supporting line must appear clearly.
facts.expected_value: A focused planning space for small product teams.
facts.canonical_answer: A focused planning space for small product teams.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'A focused planning space for small product teams.' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved CTA must appear.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Start a sprint preview' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The artifact should use exact 1080 x 1080 px canvas size.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Image metadata should be 1080 by 1080 pixels; this is separate from aspect ratio.

facts.description: The artifact must have 1:1 aspect ratio.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Rendered output has 1:1 aspect ratio; visible crop should not be landscape or another format.

facts.description: The image must use the current deep green, warm cream, amber, and soft sage FlowForge palette.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Dominant visual system should clearly follow the current palette from env; exact pixel-level hex matching is not required.

facts.description: The current FlowForge icon or wordmark must sit in the top-right safe area.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Current logo/mark treatment is visibly placed in the top-right safe area and is not replaced by a deprecated mark.

facts.description: Product name and headline occupy the primary copy area with the headline prominent.
facts.expected_value: Product name and headline occupy the primary copy area with the headline prominent.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The title/headline area is visually clear and follows the current layout zone.

facts.description: Supporting line and CTA appear in the lower area.
facts.expected_value: Supporting line and CTA appear in the lower area.
facts.semantic_acceptance: CTA and related lower information are visibly placed in the required CTA zone.

facts.description: Essential copy, logo, and CTA stay inside the 72 px safe margin.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No essential text, logo, or CTA is clipped, flush to the edge, or outside a visibly safe area.

lower supporting line and CTA zone

facts.description: Hero visual includes cards, columns, or weekly planning lanes.

facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: cards, columns, or weekly lanes visible.

facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: focus state or current week cue visible.

facts.description: Deprecated assets, templates, stale slogans, wrong campaign copy, and forbidden directions must not be used as active final design elements.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Deprecated items may appear only in explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded context, never as active final design elements.

facts.description: Old or deprecated slogan/copy 'Automate Everything' must not be used as active headline, subtitle, supporting line, CTA, or claim.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The old copy may only appear in explicit exclusion/deprecated context, not as active final poster text.

facts.description: Old logo/mark treatment 'bottom-centered logo' must not be used as the primary logo or brand mark.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The old logo/mark may only appear in explicit exclusion/deprecated context, not as the active visible logo.

facts.description: The image must not add unsupported guarantees, discounts, free offers, safety promises, or exaggerated performance claims not present in approved_current copy.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden if presented as active marketing copy; acceptable only if clearly shown as draft/test/do-not-use material.
forbidden_patterns: ship every roadmap twice as fast
allowed_patterns: save 10 hours every week guaranteed.{0,120}(deprecated|do not use|excluded|forbidden|retired|old|draft|archived|test)

facts.semantic_acceptance: Overall visible style should match the current brand tone and avoid deprecated genre cues.

facts.description: Purple gradient must not be used as dominant background or active palette.

facts.description: Bottom-centered logo placement from the old template must not be used.

facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

calculation_notes: All expected facts are derived from task-visible env files. The final copy is selected by choosing the approved_current row in env/campaign_brief.md and rejecting archived, draft, test, and deprecated rows. Platform specs require 1080 x 1080 px and 1:1 aspect ratio with 72 px safe margin. Current layout requires product/headline copy zone, top-right app icon zone, central calm planning-board UI hero zone, lower supporting line and CTA zone. Hero visual must include: planning-board UI visible, cards, columns, or weekly lanes visible, focus state or current week cue visible, product interface cue visible. Deprecated exclusions are role-based: purple gradient, bottom-centered logo, Automate Everything, lightning-bolt automation hero, busy dashboard wall; they may be mentioned only in explicit excluded/deprecated/do-not-use context and must not be active final design elements. Unsupported claim examples rejected from draft/test copy: save 10 hours every week guaranteed, never misses a task, replace every manual process overnight, ship every roadmap twice as fast. Additional specific forbidden visual caps are derived from visual_rules.json, deprecated_assets.json, and style_guide.md for concrete old-template or forbidden-asset failures.
